description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a pastel green and blue color scheme. The front panel includes a control area with a single joystick and two buttons, as well as a coin slot and a lower access door. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'PUNTER HUNTER' in bold, stylized letters. Both side panels are decorated with vibrant artwork depicting a football player in action, reaching for a football, with several flying ducks in the background, blending sports and hunting themes. The back panel is plain black with ventilation slots, and the cabinet stands on a sturdy orange base. The overall build suggests a combination of wood, plastic, and metal, typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A pastel green and blue upright arcade game cabinet with sports and hunting-themed side artwork, a single joystick control panel, and a 'PUNTER HUNTER' marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, access door, and the 'PUNTER HUNTER' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the colorful artwork of a football player and flying ducks against a blue background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with ventilation slots and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same football player and duck artwork.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons, spaced apart on a flat panel with colored button caps.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'PUNTER HUNTER' in bold, stylized letters with a gradient effect, matching the cabinet's pastel color theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display colorful artwork of a football player in green and white uniform reaching for a football, with several flying ducks above, set against a blue sky and grassy ground.
